name: Tungtex (Holdings) Company Limited
summary: Tungtex (Holdings) Company Limited, an investment holding company, manufactures, sells, retails, and trades in garments in North America, Asia, Europe, and internationally. The company manufactures and exports ladies sportswear, casual wear, and suit pieces; and various ladies career and casual sportswear for department stores, chain stores, specialty stores, catalogs, and designer labels, as well as silk-blended, linen, cotton, and synthetic apparel products. As at 31 March 2020, it operated 169 Betu brand shops in the Mainland China. Tungtex (Holdings) Company Limited was founded in 1977 and is based in Kwun Tong, Hong Kong.
